notes: Half-rack width, 1RU device. SDI carries 16 channels embedded audio (not 8 — HDMI carries 8 channels). Power: internal 100-240V AC 50/60Hz supply (max 100W); the AC inlet connector type is not explicitly named on the spec page so no IEC port is listed. A 4-pin XLR 12V DC input is confirmed for external/battery power. Media slots: 2x SD card (UHS-I/UHS-II). Video: SD/HD up to 1080p60, 2K DCI, Ultra HD up to 2160p30. 10-bit 4:2:2. Audio: 24-bit 48 kHz.

ports.name: SDI Monitor Output
ports.note: SDI monitor output; 16 channels embedded audio

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: 1 Gb/s Ethernet for network control and streaming

ports.name: USB-C
ports.note: USB 3.0 Type-C, up to 5 Gb/s; external media recording/expansion

ports.name: Headphone
ports.note: 6.35mm headphone output with mono speaker monitoring

ports.name: DC Power Input
ports.note: 4-pin XLR 12V DC input for external/battery power; device also has internal 100-240V AC 50/60Hz supply (max 100W) — physical AC inlet type not explicitly stated in source
